notes: Iteration 1 benchmark covers evals 1-4. Evals 5-6 are defined in evals/evals.json but are still pending execution.
With-skill pass rate: 98% avg vs baseline 51% avg (+47% improvement)
Biggest delta on motion-audit (100% vs 14%) — skill enforces structured output format that baseline omits entirely
motion-enhance with-skill added reduced-motion guard; baseline OMITTED it entirely — critical accessibility gap
Hero timeline 4+ chained calls still failed even with-skill in eval 1 — worth tightening the hero timeline generation template
With-skill uses ~2.2x more tokens (58K vs 26K avg) and ~32% more time (206s vs 156s avg) — expected cost of systematic workflow
Baseline eval 2 (wellness) scored surprisingly well (83%) — the brief was specific enough that general knowledge produced good results
back.out(1.2) in baseline eval 2 technically passed the easing assertion but violates the subtle personality spirit
